seo.title: Ksenia Isidorova — Applied AI & AI Operations Specialist
seo.description: Applied AI engineer that builds custom AI solutions around real workflows — from research and prototyping to testing, integration and continuous improvement.

hero.introBefore: I help teams turn AI experiments into
hero.introStrong: reliable internal tools, agents, chat-bots, automation workflows and production-ready systems
hero.introAfter: — from problem framing and prototyping to integration, documentation and post-launch support.
hero.toolLine: Building with Codex, Claude Code, agents, APIs and automation workflows.
hero.availability: Open to applied AI Research / Operations roles

profile.kicker: Broad AI expertise. Deep technical foundation.
paragraphs: I work at the intersection of applied AI, creative thinking, and engineering. My background combines production experience in global gaming companies, SMEs, and AI startups. I’m especially interested in AI tools designed around real user needs and workflows — systems that reduce repetitive work, create more room for creative thinking, and support professional growth. I’m equally fascinated by building personal AI tools for learning, self-development, and everyday practices, including a personal mindfulness mentor and an AI-assisted reading mentor for language learning, reading aloud, and deeper engagement with books.

I currently work as an AI Researcher and Generative AI Consultant, with a broader practice across AI operations, creative AI systems and pipelines, cultural AI, internal automation tooling, and AI-assisted product development. I use Codex, Claude, Gemini, Custom Gemini Gems and GPTs, Python, JavaScript, Node.js, CSS, Git, and agentic development workflows to generate ideas, build testable prototypes, debug, compare approaches, and turn the strongest concepts into working systems. I’m hands-on in early-stage development and collaborate with engineers and developers to bring the strongest prototypes into reliable, production-ready solutions.

I lead AI product development across the full lifecycle: from workflow audits, use-case research, and problem framing to product roadmaps, technical setup, prototyping, testing, and production delivery. I define the project structure, architecture, infrastructure, and resources needed to move from idea to working product, then integrate AI tools into real team workflows through documentation, onboarding, feedback loops, and post-launch support.

approachSection.description: AI is not a one-off experiment. I care whether a tool solves a real problem, fits the workflow, can be repeated by the team and continues to improve after launch.

approach.title: Discover
approach.text: Find real workflow bottlenecks and define where AI can create value.

approach.title: Prototype
approach.text: Use Codex, Claude Code, APIs, n8n and existing AI tools to build fast working versions.

approach.title: Integrate
approach.text: Connect tools to team workflows, document usage and support adoption.

approach.title: Improve
approach.text: Evaluate output, collect feedback, debug issues and iterate after launch.

workSection.headingBefore: AI systems that teams can actually use
workSection.description: Multi-agentic systems, internal chat-bots and automation tools — designed around real workflows and set up for real users, with post-integration support and personalized usage guides&documentation.

projects.title: Game development Applied AI solutions
projects.type: Art Production R&D · Glera Games / Vizor Apps
projects.summary: Full-cycle AI systems for production teams: use-case research, implementation strategy, dataset curation, model training, testing and evaluation, environment setup, integration, documentation, user onboarding and post-delivery support. The focus is not only on model or AI tool quality, but on whether the system can be comfortably and consistently used by the team, embedded into regular workflows, and significantly reduce production time.

projects.title: Internal AI Automation & Assistants · Glera Games / Vizor Apps
projects.summary: Internal AI tools for operational teams: n8n workflows, multi-agent automations, Slack-integrated assistants and department-specific ChatGPT and Gemini bots for analytics, research, documentation and daily workflows. Built around practical team needs, fast prototyping, testing and iteration.
tags: LLM Guides and pipelines for art professionals

projects.title: SWANA Cultural AI Models · Qareeb / ARK Knowledge Networks
projects.summary: Work on culturally aware generative AI initiatives focused on SWANA-region representation, localized model behavior and bias reduction. Contributions include dataset curation, model training and evaluation, prompt template engineering and integration in multi-tool AI workflows.

projects.title: Metaheads AI
projects.summary: My freshly made applied AI studio with a small expert team, focused on turning business and professionals' workflows into practical reliable AI systems.

projects.title: Reading Mentor
projects.summary: My prototype-to-product experiment that turns TXT and EPUB books into an interactive learning flow with voice interaction, contextual explanations, vocabulary memory and pronunciation feedback. Started as a personal tool for English reading practice, now - official Metaheads AI Product. Usable app in pre-launch stage. Great case of rapid AI product development, fast AI-powered prototyping and scaling potential.

experienceSection.headingBefore: Leading AI projects from research to

experience.role: AI Art Researcher · Generative AI Specialist
experience.text: Own full-cycle AI R&D and internal AI operations: researching use cases, designing datasets, training and evaluating models, building custom GPT and Gemini tools, prototyping automations, integrating workflows into production, documenting systems, onboarding users and supporting teams after delivery.
Led technical delivery for a Unity and INK product across content systems, UI, animation and VFX. Built C# and Python tools, improved cross-team workflows and maintained implementation documentation.

Shipped two large-scale free-to-play products, automated production tasks, debugged and optimised complex content systems, led feature implementation and raised the department’s technical proficiency through training and mentorship.

Worked directly with small teams and varied clients, translating open-ended needs into practical technical and creative solutions. Led delivery from initial concept through implementation, iteration and production support.
